summary: Frontend-only E2E testing for FLOWTYM PMS Phase 1+2 (auth + Supabase live reservations). All 10 requested test items passed. Login page renders correctly, valid login redirects to dashboard, invalid creds show 'Invalid login credentials' error, logout returns to login. Reservation page shows the LiveReservationsBanner with correct hotel 'Mas Provencal Aix · direction', KPI total = 4, exactly 4 rows (RES-001 Pierre Bernard, RES-002 Sophie Dubois, RES-003 Ali Larabi, RES-004 Marie Martin) — confirming RLS scoping. Refresh button triggers refetch, data remains intact.

issues: Topbar still displays the legacy mock hotel ('Flowtym Premium Resort / Paris') from configStore instead of the authenticated hotel 'Mas Provencal Aix' from useAuth/useActiveHotel. Acceptable for Phase 1+2 as legacy mock coexists by design, but should be migrated to live data in next phase.

Recharts console warning: 'The width(-1) and height(-1) of chart should be greater than 0'. Container sizing issue in a chart wrapper — non-blocking but worth fixing (add minWidth/minHeight or fixed aspect).

test_results.9_refresh_button_triggers_refetch: PASS (RefreshCw icon present, data refetched, 4 rows after refresh)
test_results.10_rls_no_cross_hotel_leak: PASS (only the 4 expected rows of Mas Provencal Aix returned)

action_items: (Optional/Phase 3) Migrate Topbar to display the active hotel from useActiveHotel() instead of mock configStore.hotel.
(Minor) Fix Recharts container sizing warning on Flowday dashboard (width/height = -1).
critical_code_review_comments: LoginPage hardcodes default email 'walilarabi@gmail.com' and full name 'Wali Larabi' in initial state — fine for dev but must be cleared before any production/staging release.
Topbar currently mixes mock data (configStore.hotel, users[0]) with live session (useAuth) — clearly intentional during migration but should be tracked and removed in next phase.
Banner correctly uses data-testid attributes everywhere; no MongoDB/_id concerns since stack is fully Supabase.
test_credentials: walilarabi@gmail.com / Flowtym2026! (admin direction, Mas Provencal Aix)
seed_data_creation: None — used existing Supabase seed (5 hotels, 4 reservations on Mas Provencal Aix).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 1+2 fully validated end-to-end. Live Supabase auth + read of reservations confirmed for hotel 00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001. Reservation creation/edit are NOT yet wired to Supabase (legacy mock UI sits below the banner). Next phases should validate write operations and migration of Topbar/Sidebar to live hotel data.
